name: @rello-platform/eslint-plugin-platform-rules
description: ESLint plugin codifying eight Rello platform drift signals from PLATFORM-PATTERNS-CATALOG.md (no-empty-catches, canonical-slug-imports, no-process-env-secret-compare, no-env-var-bearer-fallback, no-inline-tab-arrays, no-redeclared-api-response-types, no-fixture-data-when-upstream-unshipped, lead-not-contact). Mechanical enforcement layer paired with Class-Level Rules + Patterns Catalog.
